title: crotalaria loandae
intro: Crotalaria loandae, a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, is native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria loandae are attributed to its high levels of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria loandae include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, although its use and preparation can vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
